title: Moving a Final Asset from a task to Asset Library Automatically
excerpt:

posts.author: tiffanispealman (Tiffani Spealman)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m using the creative process template that includes an Asset Library board.
I’m curious if there is a way to automatically include anything that is uploaded in the “Final Asset” column right into our Asset Library if the status is marked Approved.

Has anyone done this or know how I could automate this? I kind of expected that to happen automatically with this template.

Thanks for all the help ahead of time!

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tiffani!

Charlotte here for the monday team! Happy to help out with this!

Good point - it seems like it would be an included automation of this workflow.

Here is an automation that could be helpful for achieving this:

Screen Shot 2024-01-05 at 5.55.13 PM1342×430 20.1 KB

Let me know if this is helpful or if you were looking for something different!
